systems.label: Google Web Search
notes: A human operator may manually search Google and transcribe visible organic results.
Observations can vary by date, time, browser, account state, location, and personalization.
One observation is not stable global Google truth.

systems.label: Internet Archive Metadata Search
notes: A human operator may manually use the Internet Archive website metadata/catalog search.
Record visible filters, exact query, and whether results are item, collection, or file-level.
This pack does not call Internet Archive APIs.

systems.label: Internet Archive Full Text/OCR Search
systems.baseline_role: full-text or OCR-style archive baseline where available
notes: A human operator may manually use visible full-text/OCR search surfaces.
Record searched scope or collection where the UI exposes it.
Distinguish parent scans from page, article, or member-level hits.
